narrative:
No non-compliant items identified during this inspection. 
The inspection and exit briefing were conducted with the applicant. 
 
We will send a copy of your new license to you within 30 days, unless additional review is required. You do not need to 
take further action at this time. If you have not received your license within 30 days, please contact the USDA at 970-494-
7478. 
 
Conducting regulated activities prior to issuance of a valid USDA License is a violation of the Animal Welfare Act.
